title: SEC4: sequence fallback to u64::MAX undocumented MLS impact
description: client.rs line 185: `let sequence = v["params"]["sequence"].as_u64().unwrap_or(u64::MAX);` silently places a user with a missing sequence field at the end of the online list, making them never the MLS admin. This is a consequence that directly affects the MLS admin election invariant documented in CLAUDE.md. No comment explains this fallback policy or why u64::MAX was chosen (vs. 0, which would make them the admin). A maintainer who sees this will not know whether this fallback is intentional protocol hardening or an oversight. Fix: add comment // Sequence missing: treat as last-connected to ensure we never mistakenly elect an unauthenticated admin.
